channel.title: Azure File Sync on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure File Sync on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure File Sync in Belgium Central, Malaysia West, and Indonesia Central
item.description:
Azure File Sync is now generally available in Belgium Central, Malaysia West, and Indonesia Central. The service supports tiering data from on-premises Windows Servers to Azure Files for hybrid scenarios and migration.

  • Source: Azure Updates
